# QTS

**Category:** AI Colocation / GPU Hosting Partners  
**Website:** https://www.qtsdatacenters.com/

## Headline
Capacity-focused data center platform for buyers comparing leased capacity versus owned buildouts.

## Overview
QTS is relevant to buyers who need capacity planning options and want to compare colocation or campus-scale availability against self-developed infrastructure. It is especially useful in enterprise planning conversations where deployment speed and operational outsourcing are part of the equation.

## Key capabilities
- colocation and capacity sourcing
- large campus deployment options
- enterprise infrastructure support environment

## Best fit for
- buyers needing near-term capacity
- enterprise infrastructure teams comparing buy-versus-build paths
- organizations prioritizing operational speed

## Considerations
Best reviewed alongside modular deployment options to clarify tradeoffs in control, timing, and long-term flexibility.
